title: Duc Thai Tran
text:
Duc Thai Tran
PhD Candidate in Marketing
Macquarie Business School (MQBS)
An in-progress polymath, documentary and street photographer, piano player, and advertising researcher. I study advertising strategy and effectiveness, storytelling, and brand identity. My research focuses on the creative journey in producing ads, how stories are developed, and how to maintain brand identity’s clarity throughout the whole process.
